summary: The task is complete in substance. The inspected implementation adds Prisma/SQLite persistence, migrations, repo-local database configuration, deterministic db preparation, idempotent protected endpoint seed defaults, generated schema documentation, and repeatability coverage. It maps directly to endpoint-tool-management.md and stays within the endpoint persistence foundation scope without adding out-of-scope UI, MCP, REST, auth, or reset behavior.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is wired through scripts/db-prepare.mjs to create data/, apply Prisma migrations, generate Prisma Client, and run endpoint seed defaults.

db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts, which runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular seeded endpoint, parameter, and response-case rows.

prisma/schema.prisma represents immutable endpoint IDs, names, titles/descriptions, enabled state, delete codes, default responses, timestamps, ordered parameters, response cases, and basic endpoint/case failure configuration fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase persistence shape and documents the seed defaults.
The provided deterministic check summary reports all mandatory gates passing: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
